settings.text: Professional grooming for dogs and cats of all breeds and sizes.

settings.title: Dog Grooming
settings.description: Prices vary by breed, coat condition, and behavior. Call for a quote on breeds not listed.

settings.name: Small Dog Bath & Brush
settings.description: Up to 20 lbs. Shampoo, conditioner, blow-dry, brush, ears, nails.

settings.name: Small Dog Full Groom
settings.description: Up to 20 lbs. Bath & Brush plus breed-specific haircut and styling.

settings.name: Medium Dog Bath & Brush
settings.description: 21–50 lbs. Shampoo, conditioner, blow-dry, brush, ears, nails.

settings.name: Medium Dog Full Groom
settings.description: 21–50 lbs. Bath & Brush plus breed-specific haircut and styling.

settings.name: Large Dog Full Groom
settings.description: 51+ lbs. Full service groom including bath, cut, blow-dry, ears, nails.

settings.name: Cat Bath & Brush
settings.description: Gentle shampoo, blow-dry, brushout, ear cleaning, and nail trim.

settings.name: Cat Full Groom
settings.description: Bath & Brush plus sanitary trim, belly shave, or full body trim as needed.

settings.name: Lion Cut
settings.description: Full body shave with mane, tail pom, and leg boots left intact. Popular for long-haired breeds.

settings.title: Ear Cleaning
settings.description: Gentle cleaning and inspection with every groom

settings.title: Nail Trimming
settings.description: Trimmed and filed for comfort and safety

settings.title: Teeth Brushing
settings.description: Freshens breath and supports dental health

settings.title: Gland Expression
settings.description: External anal gland expression on request

settings.title: Blueberry Facial
settings.description: Brightens and freshens the face area

settings.title: De-Shedding
settings.description: Reduces loose fur and keeps coats healthy

settings.title: Check In
settings.description: Drop off your pet and let us know about any special needs, sensitivities, or style preferences.

settings.title: Bath & Dry
settings.description: A thorough wash with organic shampoo and conditioner, followed by a gentle blow-dry.

settings.title: Style & Finish
settings.description: Breed-appropriate cut and styling, plus ear cleaning, nail trim, and finishing touches.

settings.title: Happy Pickup
settings.description: We’ll text you when your pet is ready. Pick up a fresh, happy, great-smelling companion.

settings.title: Questions?
settings.text:
(555) 926-3400
hello@pawlish.co

We’re happy to help you choose the right service.

settings.question: How do I book an appointment?
settings.answer: Call us or stop by the salon. We recommend booking 3–5 days in advance, especially for weekends. Walk-ins are welcome on a first-come basis when slots are available.

settings.question: What should I bring to my pet’s first visit?
settings.answer: Bring vaccination records (rabies and DHPP for dogs, rabies and FVRCP for cats). Let us know about any skin conditions, allergies, or behavioral concerns.

settings.question: My pet is nervous around groomers. Can you help?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Our groomers are trained in fear-free handling techniques. We work at your pet’s pace, take breaks when needed, and never force anything.

settings.question: How long does a grooming session take?
settings.answer: A bath and brush typically takes 1–1.5 hours. A full groom takes 2–3 hours depending on breed, coat condition, and temperament. We’ll give you a time estimate at check-in.

settings.question: What products do you use?
settings.answer: We use organic, hypoallergenic shampoos and conditioners. If your pet has specific skin needs, we carry medicated options and can work with your vet’s recommendations.
